tool.name: SameStr Filter
tool.description: nucleotide variant profiles by coverage, sample, marker, and position-based criteria
tool.command:
ln -s '$input_snvs' '${input_snvs.element_identifier}.${input_snvs.ext}' && ln -s '$input_names' '${input_snvs.element_identifier}.names.txt' && #if $sample_filtering.samples_select: ln -s '$sample_filtering.samples_select' '${input_snvs.element_identifier}.select.txt' && #end if
samestr filter --marker-dir '$database.fields.path' --input-files '${input_snvs.element_identifier}.${input_snvs.ext}' --input-names '${input_snvs.element_identifier}.names.txt' $output_settings.keep_poly $output_settings.keep_mono $output_settings.delete_pos --clade-min-samples $clade_settings.clade_min_samples #if str($clade_settings.marker_selection.retain_or_drop) == 'retain': --marker-keep '$clade_settings.marker_selection.marker_keep' #elif str($clade_settings.marker_selection.retain_or_drop) == 'drop': --marker-remove '$clade_settings.marker_selection.marker_remove' #end if --marker-trunc-len $clade_settings.marker_trunc_len --sample-var-min-n-vcov $sample_variant_filtering.sample_var_min_n_vcov --sample-var-min-f-vcov $sample_variant_filtering.sample_var_min_f_vcov --sample-pos-min-n-vcov $sample_position_filtering.sample_pos_min_n_vcov --sample-pos-min-sd-vcov $sample_position_filtering.sample_pos_min_sd_vcov #if $sample_filtering.samples_select: --samples-select '${input_snvs.element_identifier}.select.txt' #end if --samples-min-n-hcov $sample_filtering.samples_min_n_hcov #if $samples_min_f_hcov: --samples-min-f-hcov $sample_filtering.samples_min_f_hcov #end if #if $samples_min_m_vcov: --samples-min-m-vcov $sample_filtering.samples_min_m_vcov #end if --global-pos-min-n-vcov $global_position_filtering.global_pos_min_n_vcov #if $global_position_filtering.global_pos_min_f_vcov: --global-pos-min-f-vcov $global_position_filtering.global_pos_min_f_vcov #end if

param.name: input_snvs
param.label: SNV profile to filter
param.help: A (multisample) SNV profile typically generated with SameStr merge

param.name: input_names
param.label: Sample identifiers
param.help: Dataset listing the sample/reference genome identifiers one per line

param.name: database
param.label: SameStr database
param.help: SameStr database built from MetaPhlAn or mOTUS markers

param.label: Keep polymorphic positions only
param.help: Keep only positions that are polymorphic in at least one sample (default: False).

param.label: Keep monomorphic positions only
param.help: Keep only positions that are monomorphic in all samples (default: False).

param.label: Delete global positions
param.help: Delete masked marker and global positions from array instead of np.nan (default: False).

param.label: Minimum samples per clade
param.help: Skip clades with fewer than this number of samples (default: 2)

param.label: Markers to retain
param.help: Explicit list of markers (one per line) to keep. Markers not specified in the list will be dropped.

param.label: Markers to drop
param.help: List of markers (one per line) to remove.

param.label: Marker truncation length
param.help: Number of nucleotides to trim from each end of a marker sequence. (default: 50)

param.label: Minimum variant coverage (nucleotides)
param.help: Remove variants with nucleotide coverage below this threshold (default: 2).

param.label: Minimum variant coverage (fraction)
param.help: Remove variants with coverage below this fraction (default: 0.05).

param.label: Minimum position coverage (nucleotides)
param.help: Remove positions with nucleotide coverage below this threshold (default: 1).

param.label: Position coverage standard deviation cutoff
param.help: Remove positions with coverage outside mean ± this standard deviation (default: 3.0).

param.label: Subset of samples to retain
param.help: Names of samples to retain must be listed in this input (one sample per line).

param.label: Minimum horizontal coverage (nucleotides)
param.help: Remove samples with horizontal coverage below this nucleotide count (default: 5000).

param.label: Minimum horizontal coverage (fraction)
param.help: Remove samples with horizontal coverage below this fraction (default: None).

param.label: Minimum mean vertical coverage
param.help: Remove samples with mean vertical coverage below this value (default: None) .

param.label: Minimum sample coverage per position (count)
param.help: Remove positions covered by fewer than this number of samples (default: 2). Overrides fraction-based filtering.

param.label: Minimum sample coverage per position (fraction)
param.help: Remove positions covered by fewer than this fraction of samples (default: None).

tool.help:
@SAMESTR_INTRO@
SameStr Filter ..............
SameStr Filter applies quality control and filtering to nucleotide variant profiles obtained from multiple metagenomic samples. This tool removes low-quality variants, positions, and samples to prepare clean data for downstream strain comparison analysis.
**Input Requirements**
For each analysis, the following inputs must be provided:
- A (multisample) clade-specific SNV profile as generated by SameStr merge - A list of the samples present in the SNV profile in simple one-sample-per-line text format as generated by SameStr merge - The MetaPhlAn or mOTUS clade marker database that matches the database used to generate the input profiles
**Filtering Parameters: Output file settings**
- Keep polymorphic positions only: Retain only positions that show variation in at least one sample. - Keep monomorphic positions only: Retain only positions that are identical across all samples. - Delete global positions: Remove masked positions entirely instead of marking them as missing values.
**Filtering Parameters: Clade settings**
- Minimum samples per clade: Skip clades with fewer than the specified number of samples. - Markers to exclude/include: Selectively remove or keep specific markers for targeted analysis. - Marker truncation length: Trim nucleotides from marker ends to avoid alignment edge effects.
**Filtering Parameters: Sample variant filtering**
- Minimum variant coverage (nucleotides/fraction): Remove variants with insufficient read coverage.
**Filtering Parameters: Sample position filtering**
- Minimum position coverage (nucleotides): Remove positions with inadequate coverage. - Position coverage standard deviation cutoff: Remove positions with extreme coverage deviations.
**Filtering Parameters: Sample filtering**
- Subset of samples: Select specific samples for analysis using a tabular dataset listing desired samples one-per-line. - Minimum horizontal coverage (nucleotides/fraction): Remove samples with insufficient breadth of coverage. - Minimum mean vertical coverage: Remove samples with insufficient depth of coverage.
**Filtering Parameters: Global position filtering**
- Minimum sample coverage per position (count/fraction): Remove positions covered by too few samples.
**Results and Outputs**
The tool generates two main outputs:
- A new, cleaned SNV profile in compressed NumPy format (npz) with filters applied, which can be used with SameStr compare. - Identifiers of retained samples in text format with one retained sample per line.
